title: HDSkins
description: You want to use high-resolution skins instead of the old-fashioned 64x64 skins in Minecraft? Then you've come to the right place! Upload skins up to 2048x2048 pixels and see other users' HD skins in-game.
body:
# HDSkins » Upload your high-resolution skin!

This mod gives you the possibility to upload your own HD-Skin. Every player with this mod can see your HD-Skin.

## How to upload your skin?
You can upload your skin in our dashboard (https://hdskins.de).
You can login by pressing the HDSkins-Button in your Minecraft settings.

## How to design your own skin?
* Download a skin from your skin library ([https://hdskins.de/skins](https://hdskins.de/page-skins.php))
* Ask our skin-makers on our discord to design your HD-Skin (https://discord.com/invite/KN8rDZJ)
* Create your own skin by using a design software of your choice
